contract_summary.scale: all solver constraints consume decimal 0-1 exposure vectors

strengths.notes: Blocks empty universe, too-small universe, fixed weights >100, bucket minima >100, bucket maxima below 100, and non-representable zero-exposure buckets.

strengths.item: constraints_v1 bucket_bounds supersede legacy profile buckets
Aggressive profiles avoid known efficient_risk target-vol infeasibility
strengths.notes: Profiles 8-10 switch efficient_risk to max_sharpe to avoid unreachable target volatility.

issues.title: vol_band not enforced
issues.impact: Risk profile volatility caps can be perceived as constraints while only reported as achieved/target deviation.
issues.recommendation: Enforce vol_band or rename as report-only target.

issues.title: max attainable bucket exposure is not prechecked
issues.impact: Minimum bucket requirements can be impossible under max_weight even when at least one asset has exposure.
issues.recommendation: Compute maximum attainable exposure using per-asset exposures, max_weight, min_weight, locks, and remaining budget.

issues.title: fallback postprocess can lose constraints
issues.impact: Solver failure can produce filtered fallback portfolio that keeps only coarse bucket/lock logic.
issues.recommendation: Return lost_constraints and require explicit fallback acceptance under strict mode.

issues.title: geo/group constraint exceptions are logged and skipped
issues.impact: A failed group vector build can remove requested constraints without a result warning.
issues.recommendation: Surface skipped constraints in result warnings and fail under strict_feasibility.

issues.title: strict_feasibility flag is built but not used to alter fallback behavior
issues.evidence: constraints_builder_v1.py:233-236; optimizer_core.py:915-919 extracts flags but does not branch on strict_feasibility
issues.impact: A caller may believe strict mode blocks degraded portfolios, but fallback behavior remains active.
issues.recommendation: Implement strict_feasibility semantics or remove the flag from contract.

issues.title: locked assets bypass suitability
issues.impact: User-forced positions can keep unsuitable funds in low-risk portfolios; intentional but should be explicit.
issues.recommendation: Return locked_suitability_overrides with reason and exposure contribution.
